item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness on 3 March 2026
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline in recent sessions, reflecting broader market pressures and sector-specific challenges. Despite pockets of strong performance, the segment’s overall trend has been negative, with breadth indicators signalling a pronounced imbalance between advancing and declining stocks. Time: Mar 03 2026 04:00 PM IST

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off Amid Defensive-Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, with a decline of 1.31% on the day and a sharper 2.06% drop over the past five trading days. This downturn reflects a broad-based sell-off, with defensive and cyclical stocks diverging in performance amid shifting market dynamics. Time: Mar 03 2026 04:00 PM IST

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad-Based Weakness Amid Sectoral Divergence
item.description: The mid-cap segment witnessed a notable decline on 3 March 2026, with the BSE Midcap index slipping by 1.04% amid broad-based selling pressure. Despite the recent five-day trend showing a modest 0.2% dip, the segment continues to display significant volatility, driven by uneven sectoral performances and a weak advance-decline ratio that signals cautious investor sentiment. Time: Mar 03 2026 04:00 PM IST

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness on 3 Mar 2026
item.description: The mid-cap segment, as represented by the BSE Midcap index, experienced a notable downturn on 3 March 2026, declining by 1.04% on the day and registering a 0.2% drop over the past five trading sessions. Despite this overall weakness, select stocks within the segment demonstrated resilience, underscoring a mixed performance landscape that investors should carefully analyse. Time: Mar 03 2026 03:00 PM IST

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as Defensive Stocks Outperform Cyclicals
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn in recent sessions, with a decline of 1.31% on the day and a sharper 2.06% drop over the past five days. Despite this broad weakness, select heavyweight stocks and defensive sectors have shown resilience, highlighting a cautious market environment amid ongoing volatility. Time: Mar 03 2026 03:00 PM IST

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, reflecting broader market challenges and sector-specific pressures. Despite pockets of strong individual stock performances, the overall small-cap segment has underperformed key benchmarks, with breadth indicators signalling a cautious investor sentiment. Time: Mar 03 2026 03:00 PM IST
